description: Product Description Welcome to share your decoration experiences with Tifuly. Tifuly Artificial Hydrangea Advantages: 1.100% Brand New, real touch silk petals and fluffy flower heads give you an elegant and realistic looking, high quality and non-toxic, won't fade over time. 2. Artificial single stem flowers are easy to bend or cut,no need water, never die, inexpensive, vivid as fresh flowers. ideal for home decor and floral arrangment. 3.We have 9 different colors are available for sale, and we'll continue to update new color. welcome to keep attention to our stores. 4.Big package quantity: 5 PCS will meet your daily use, if want show more floral effect, please buy 2 lots or more. Popular with: Centerpieces/ Wedding arches/ flower bouquets/ Home & Office decoration/ Interior designers/ Restaurant & Hotel decoration/ Florists,etc. Five pieces into 1 big fluffy bouquet, put them in a midium size vase, perfect decoration to your house. Size: Height approx 18.5 inch/ 47cm, flower head 6.6 inch/ 17cm in diameter. Big vivid leaves Look, the veins are distinct, leaf width 4.13inch/10.5cm, they can be removed and reattached. Thoughtful Details There is slight of glue to prevent the leaves from falling naturally, and it is convenient for you to remove a small amount of leaves to make a satisfactory bouquet. Suitable for any place in your home, such as living room, bedroom, kitchen, dinner table, etc. Material: 90% silk, 10% plastic. What you get: 5 Pcs single stem artificial hydrangeas in bulk, the vase is not included. Fluffy hydrangea petals Realistic green leaves Stem details Five pieces effect Buy 2 ~ 3 colors of hydrangeas, add them to different vases to achieve different decorative effect.
